remission.spontaneous_remission_rate: Progressive cholestatic disease; median time to liver failure or transplant 12-15 years; spontaneous remission essentially zero; biliary strictures progress in majority; cholangiocarcinoma risk 10-15% lifetime
remission.best_intervention_remission_rate: Liver transplantation: 5-year survival 80-85% (curative but recurrence in 20% post-transplant); ursodeoxycholic acid (UDCA): improvement in LFTs but no transplant-free survival benefit (Phase 3 — no benefit, possibly harm at high dose); no pharmacotherapy proven to alter the natural history
remission.gap_size: Very large — no approved disease-modifying therapy exists; liver transplantation is the only definitive treatment
remission.barrier_detail: PSC has resisted all pharmacotherapy attempts; UDCA widely prescribed despite no survival benefit (at high doses — possibly harmful); the field has 20+ failed Phase 2/3 trials; norUDCA, nor-UDCA, and several FXR agonists are in Phase 3; gut-liver axis and gut microbiome increasingly implicated (80% of PSC patients have concurrent IBD)
remission.last_soc_change: 2023 — multiple Phase 3 trials underway but no approval; UDCA re-evaluated (Phase 3 Mayo trial showed no benefit); annual colon and biliary cancer surveillance as major guideline update; no approved pharmacotherapy to date
remission.outdated_treatments: High-dose UDCA (25-30 mg/kg/day) for PSC (Phase 3 trial showed increased risk of varices and transplant at high dose — 2010 Mayo trial; yet still prescribed in many centres); empirical antibiotics without biliary infection confirmation; endoscopic dilation of dominant strictures without histological sampling for cholangiocarcinoma
remission.adjunctive_emerging: Gut microbiome modulation (IBD treatment optimisation may slow PSC progression); vancomycin oral (VINTAGE trial — positive pilot; Phase 3 ongoing for paediatric PSC; mechanism: gut microbiome shift); fat-soluble vitamin supplementation (A, D, E, K); dietary: low-fat diet for malabsorption
remission.frontier_signal: Nor-ursodeoxycholic acid (norUDCA) — Phase 3 NordISC trial (positive interim data — first PSC drug showing ALP normalisation); cilofexor (FXR agonist) — Phase 3 data; nitazoxanide (gut parasite + immunomodulatory — Phase 2 MaRIA-PSC positive); BTK inhibitors for biliary inflammation; fecal microbiota transplantation (Phase 2 MELT trial)
remission.notes: Manually curated from landmark trials, registries, and guidelines (disease_db_100.json). Protected from automated overwrite.
